name: ExtensionPerson_MaritalStatus
title: R5: Marital (civil) status of a person (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Person.maritalStatus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Person.maritalStatus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Person.maritalStatus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Person.maritalStatus` has a context of Person based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Person`.
Element `Person.maritalStatus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Marital (civil) status of a person (new)
element.comment:
Element `Person.maritalStatus` has a context of Person based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Person`.
Element `Person.maritalStatus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Many countries maintain a register of births, deaths and marriages, and this would simplify that interaction

element.definition: This field contains a person's most recent marital (civil) status.
element.comment: Many countries maintain a register of births, deaths and marriages, and this would simplify that interaction
